name: Mahogany Slat Top Rectangular Outdoor Patio Dining Table - Natural - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Weather-Resistant, Farmhouse Style
description:
Dine outdoors in style with the Mahogany Slat Top Rectangular Outdoor Patio Dining Table from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Crafted from weather-resistant mahogany wood for years of use, this outdoor dining table features a spacious slatted tabletop for resting your drinks, dishes and other items. It comes with an umbrella hole to help provide a little shade when needed. Designed to seat up to six people, simply add coordinating chairs to host friends and family for brunches or dinner parties.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather ∙ Create ∙ Enjoy
